metadata.description: Skills and guides for participating in the Stellar Community Fund. Created by LumenLoop; maintained by Stellar Light.

plugins.name: awesome-stellar-community-fund
plugins.description: Twelve SCF skills: claim verification for reviewers, live round and open-RFP resolution, round/application review, submission and interest-form drafting, budgeting, prescreen, competitor analysis, referral prep, and tranche reporting.
